phrases: I eat a boiled egg for breakfast every day.

The juice is sweet and very refreshing.

We eat breakfast in the kitchen every morning.
I brush my teeth in the bathroom every morning.
The bathroom is clean and bright.
My bedroom is small but very cozy.
I do my homework in my bedroom after school.
I look out of the window in the morning.
The cat is sitting near the window and watching outside.

The computer is on the desk in my room.

The laptop is on the table and it is turned on.

The city is very busy during the daytime.

The park is green and full of trees and flowers.

The sea is calm and blue today.

The street is busy with cars and people today.

I finish my homework before I start other work.
I don’t have much time to finish my homework.
Time goes quickly when I play with my friends.
Today is a beautiful day with sunny weather.
I study a little every day after school.

The night is quiet and the sky is full of stars.

English is an important language to learn at school.
We speak our language at home with our family.

I know the answer to this simple math question.
